content.full_text:
Fern Polrucal PnacrrcEs CounarssroN
428 J Street o Suite 620 . Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 . Fax (916) 322-0886
June I 8,2004
Robert C. Cheasty
Cheasty & Cheasty
Post Office Box 8357
Berkeley, CA94707
Re:
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. ril-04-133
Dear Mr. Cheasty:
This letter confirms the receipt of your June 8, }OB,request for advice regarding an
unpaid president of a nonprofit orgarizatton. Under the provisions of Califomia Code of
Regulations section 18329OX8)(B), unless you are an authorized representative of the person for
whom you seek assistance, the Fair Political Practices Commission cannot address your
questions or provide analysis.
Formal written advice may be requested when the name, title orposition, and mailing
address of the person whose duties are in question are provided. (Regulation 18329(bX2XA).)
I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review.
If you believe a violation of the Political Reform Act has occurred, you may file the
enclosed complaint form with ourEnforcement Division-
Should you have any additional questions with regard to this matter, please contact the
Commission at (916) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Luisa
General Counsel
Enclosures
LM je
